variant: 24,000 and 30,000 lb per column mobile column lifts
capacity: MP-24: 24,000 lbs per column; MP-30: 30,000 lbs per column; up to 240,000 lbs total

specifications.bearing_type: Double sealed self-lubricating cylindrical roller bearings

features: Fits wheels from 13 to 24 inches, tires up to 48 inches diameter
Mix and match capacities for various axle weights
Available in AC or DC power configurations
Each column operates individually, in pairs, or synchronized
Available in sets of 2, 4, 6, or 8 columns
Twin 6-5/8 inch rubber coated steering wheels
Total lift capacity up to 240,000 lbs with 8 columns

optional_equipment.description: Advanced display with status, height, lock, inspection, and usage data

certifications: Meets nationally recognized safety standard for vehicle lifts
safety_features: Ability to park load on mechanical locks
notes: Combined manual covers MP-24 and MP-30 models
Higher capacity columns than MP-18 series
